documentation.value: Sets `display: flex` on the element, enabling flexbox layout.
Sets `display: grid` on the element, enabling CSS Grid layout.
Sets `width: 100%` and responsive `max-width` at each breakpoint.
Sets `display: none` on the element, hiding it from the layout.
Sets the number of columns for multi-column layout. E.g. `columns-2`, `columns-3`.
Sets the aspect ratio of an element. E.g. `aspect-square`, `aspect-video`, `aspect-auto`.
Sets padding on all sides. E.g. `p-0`, `p-1`, `p-2`, `p-4`, `p-8`.
Sets margin on all sides. E.g. `m-0`, `m-1`, `m-2`, `m-4`, `m-auto`.
Sets the gap between flex/grid items. E.g. `gap-1`, `gap-2`, `gap-4`.
Adds horizontal margin between child elements using `> * + *` selector.
Sets both width and height to the same value. E.g. `size-4`, `size-8`, `size-full`.
Sets gradient direction. Use with `from-{color}` and `to-{color}`. E.g. `bg-gradient-to-r`, `bg-gradient-to-br`.
Sets the starting color of a gradient. E.g. `from-blue-500`, `from-purple-400`.
Sets the ending color of a gradient. E.g. `to-green-500`, `to-pink-400`.
Creates a ring (outline) using box-shadow. E.g. `ring-0`, `ring-1`, `ring-2`, `ring-4`.
Sets `transition-property: color, background-color, border-color, text-decoration-color, fill, stroke, opacity, box-shadow, transform, filter, backdrop-filter`.
Applies styles at `min-width: 640px` and above. Usage: `sm:flex`, `sm:text-lg`.
Applies styles at `min-width: 768px` and above. Usage: `md:grid`, `md:p-8`.
Applies styles at `min-width: 1024px` and above. Usage: `lg:flex-row`, `lg:text-xl`.
Applies styles at `min-width: 1280px` and above. Usage: `xl:max-w-screen-xl`.
Applies styles at `min-width: 1536px` and above. Usage: `2xl:container`.
Applies styles on active/pressed state. Usage: `active:bg-blue-700`.
Applies styles in dark mode. Usage: `dark:bg-gray-800`, `dark:text-white`.
Applies styles when parent `.group` is hovered. Usage: `group-hover:text-blue-500`.
Applies styles when sibling `.peer` is focused. Usage: `peer-focus:text-green-500`.
Injects Tailwind's base styles (Preflight) into your CSS.
Injects Tailwind's component classes into your CSS.
Injects Tailwind's utility classes into your CSS.
Applies existing Tailwind utility classes in custom CSS. E.g. `@apply flex items-center p-4;`
Adds custom styles to a Tailwind layer: `base`, `components`, or `utilities`.
Specifies the Tailwind config file to use for this CSS file. E.g. `@config './tailwind.config.js';`
Sets `align-items: center` to vertically center flex/grid children.
Sets `justify-content: center` to horizontally center flex/grid children.
Prefix any utility with `!` to apply `!important`. E.g. `!p-4`, `!text-red-500`.
Sets flex direction to row (horizontal, default).
Sets flex direction to reversed row.
Sets flex direction to reversed column.
Allows flex items to wrap to new lines.
Flex items wrap in reverse order.
Sets `flex: 1 1 0%` — item grows and shrinks, ignoring initial size.
Sets `flex: 1 1 auto` — item grows and shrinks considering initial size.
Sets `flex: 0 1 auto` — item can shrink but won't grow.
Prevents the item from growing or shrinking.
Allows a flex item to grow to fill available space.
Prevents a flex item from growing.
Allows a flex item to shrink if needed.
Prevents a flex item from shrinking.
Sets the order of a flex/grid item. E.g. `order-1`, `order-first`, `order-last`, `order-none`.
Sets justify-self for a grid item. E.g. `justify-self-auto`, `justify-self-start`, `justify-self-center`.
Sets the content property for before/after pseudo-elements. E.g. `content-none`, `content-['text']`.
Sets number of grid columns. E.g. `grid-cols-1` through `grid-cols-12`, `grid-cols-none`, `grid-cols-subgrid`.
Sets number of grid rows. E.g. `grid-rows-1` through `grid-rows-6`, `grid-rows-none`, `grid-rows-subgrid`.
Sets how many columns a grid item spans. E.g. `col-span-1` through `col-span-12`, `col-span-full`.
Sets the starting grid column line. E.g. `col-start-1` through `col-start-13`, `col-start-auto`.
Sets the ending grid column line. E.g. `col-end-1` through `col-end-13`, `col-end-auto`.
Sets how many rows a grid item spans. E.g. `row-span-1` through `row-span-6`, `row-span-full`.
Sets the starting grid row line.
Sets the ending grid row line.
Sets implicit grid column size. E.g. `auto-cols-auto`, `auto-cols-min`, `auto-cols-max`, `auto-cols-fr`.
Sets implicit grid row size. E.g. `auto-rows-auto`, `auto-rows-min`, `auto-rows-max`, `auto-rows-fr`.
Sets horizontal gap between grid/flex items. E.g. `gap-x-2`, `gap-x-4`, `gap-x-6`.
Sets vertical gap between grid/flex items. E.g. `gap-y-2`, `gap-y-4`, `gap-y-6`.
Capitalizes the first letter of each word.
Truncates overflowing text with an ellipsis. Sets `overflow: hidden`, `text-overflow: ellipsis`, `white-space: nowrap`.
Sets `text-overflow: clip` — text is clipped without ellipsis.
Truncates text to a specific number of lines with ellipsis. E.g. `line-clamp-1`, `line-clamp-2`, `line-clamp-3`.
Places list markers inside the content flow.
Places list markers outside the content flow (default).
Applies sepia tone to the backdrop.
Sets the ring offset width. E.g. `ring-offset-0`, `ring-offset-1`, `ring-offset-2`, `ring-offset-4`, `ring-offset-8`.
Sets the ring offset color. E.g. `ring-offset-white`, `ring-offset-gray-100`.
Makes the ring render as an inset shadow.
Adds vertical dividers between children. E.g. `divide-x`, `divide-x-2`, `divide-x-4`.
Adds horizontal dividers between children. E.g. `divide-y`, `divide-y-2`, `divide-y-4`.
Sets the color of divide borders. E.g. `divide-gray-200`, `divide-slate-300`.
Adds vertical margin between child elements using `> * + *` selector.
Hints to the browser which properties will change. E.g. `will-change-auto`, `will-change-scroll`, `will-change-contents`, `will-change-transform`.
Sets the accent color for form controls. E.g. `accent-blue-500`, `accent-auto`.
Sets the text cursor color. E.g. `caret-blue-500`, `caret-transparent`.
Visually hides element but keeps it accessible to screen readers.
Undoes the `sr-only` styles, making the element visible again.
Creates a new stacking context for the element.
Sets the middle color of a gradient. Use with `from-{color}` and `to-{color}`. E.g. `via-purple-500`.
Applies styles on keyboard focus (not mouse). Usage: `focus-visible:ring-2`.
Applies styles when element or descendant has focus. Usage: `focus-within:ring-2`.
Applies styles when element is disabled. Usage: `disabled:opacity-50`.
Applies styles to visited links. Usage: `visited:text-purple-600`.
Applies styles to the first child element. Usage: `first:mt-0`.
Applies styles to the last child element. Usage: `last:mb-0`.
Applies styles to odd children. Usage: `odd:bg-gray-50`.
Applies styles to even children. Usage: `even:bg-gray-100`.
Applies styles when parent `.group` is focused. Usage: `group-focus:text-blue-500`.
Applies styles when sibling `.peer` checkbox is checked. Usage: `peer-checked:bg-blue-500`.
Applies styles when sibling `.peer` is hovered. Usage: `peer-hover:text-blue-500`.
Styles file input buttons. Usage: `file:bg-blue-500 file:text-white`.
Styles the first line of text. Usage: `first-line:uppercase`.
Styles the first letter. Usage: `first-letter:text-2xl first-letter:font-bold`.
Applies styles based on ARIA attributes. E.g. `aria-checked:bg-blue-500`, `aria-disabled:opacity-50`, `aria-expanded:rotate-180`, `aria-selected:bg-blue-100`.
Applies styles based on data attributes. E.g. `data-[state=open]:rotate-180`, `data-[active]:bg-blue-500`.
Applies styles when CSS feature is supported. E.g. `supports-[display:grid]:grid`.
Applies styles when user has no motion preference. Usage: `motion-safe:animate-bounce`.
Applies styles when user prefers reduced motion. Usage: `motion-reduce:animate-none`.
Applies styles in RTL direction. Usage: `rtl:space-x-reverse`.
Applies styles in LTR direction. Usage: `ltr:ml-4`.
Applies styles based on descendant matching. E.g. `has-[:checked]:bg-blue-500`.
Applies styles based on parent group state. E.g. `group-hover:`, `group-focus:`, `group-active:`.
Applies styles based on sibling peer state. E.g. `peer-hover:`, `peer-focus:`, `peer-checked:`.
Container query or custom min-width variant. E.g. `min-[320px]:flex`.
Applies styles below a breakpoint. E.g. `max-sm:hidden`, `max-md:flex-col`.
Defines a containment context or queries container size. E.g. `@container (min-width: 400px) { ... }`.
References values from your Tailwind config in CSS. E.g. `theme('colors.blue.500')`, `theme('spacing.4')`.
References breakpoint values in @media queries. E.g. `@media screen(md) { ... }`.
Generates variants for custom utilities. E.g. `@variants hover, focus { ... }`.
Generates responsive variants for custom utilities.
Sets `display: flow-root` — creates a new block formatting context.
Sets `display: contents` — element's children act as direct children of parent.
